meaning: n.天空醚,大气,苍天,[物]以太
examples: Her words disappeared into the ether.
It is a constitutional isomer of dimethyl ether.
Archaean cell walls lack murein, and their lipids have ether links rather than ester links.
OK. But I understand there's actually a larger story about wrestling in the ether right now.
Wal-Mart said contacts between its suppliers and Ether Tex predated the factory's presence in the building.
